What Sets Us Apart

The Akili Nest
Difference

We are not a computer lab. We are a launchpad for Kenya's next generation of builders, thinkers and creators. Every program is designed around one principle — students build something real in every single session.

9
Courses
6-18
Age Range
100%
Project-Based
Global
Competitions
You Build, Not Just Watch
Every lesson ends with something tangible. A game that runs, a robot that moves, a website that is live.
Rooted in Kenya
Our projects tackle real Kenyan challenges. Smart farming, flood detection, Nairobi traffic systems and Swahili tools.
Compete Globally
Students from Grade 3 enter Codeavour, the world's biggest AI and Coding competition for ages 7 to 18.
A Clear Path Forward
Block coding at 6. Python at 12. Machine learning at 16. Each course connects to the next with a real portfolio at the end.
Professional Grade Tools
Python, Pygame, HTML, CSS, JavaScript, Quarky robotics and PictoBlox ML Lab — the same tools used in universities worldwide.
Recognised Credentials
STEMpedia digital certificates and ARTPARK accreditation. Globally recognised and shareable on LinkedIn.
Getting Started

How It Works

From first contact to first class in four simple steps.

1
Pick a Course
Browse our 9 courses and choose based on your child's age and experience. Not sure? Contact us and we will advise.
2
Reach Out
Send a WhatsApp or email. We confirm availability, discuss scheduling and answer every question you have.
3
Start Learning
Your child joins their first session and starts building from day one. No theory-only introductions.
4
Grow and Progress
Complete the course, earn a certificate and move to the next level. Scratch to AI takes just a few years.
About Akili Nest

Building Kenya's Next Generation of Digital Innovators

Akili Nest is a Nairobi-based STEM education provider making world-class coding, robotics and AI accessible to every young Kenyan. We believe the best way to learn technology is to build with it, not just study it.

Our programs are powered by PictoBlox, Quarky Robotics and Python. Every course ends with a real project students are proud to show the world.

Based in Nairobi, Kenya. We also partner directly with schools across the city.
Globally connected. Students enter international competitions and earn globally recognised certificates.
School partnerships available. View our school program

For Schools and Institutions

Bring world-class STEM education to your school. We provide the instructor, the curriculum and the equipment. You provide the room and the students.

Partnership Benefits

Everything in One Partnership

A complete, ready-to-run STEM program that elevates your school without adding burden to your existing teachers.

📍
Onsite Training
We come to your school with all equipment and materials. Every session delivered on your premises by our trained instructors.
🎓
Certified Instructors
Professional STEM teachers who are PictoBlox and Quarky certified. CBC-aware approach that complements your school culture.
📋
Customised Curriculum
Tailored to your grade structure and timetable. We build a program that fits your school, not the other way around.
🤖
All Equipment Provided
Quarky robot kits and all learning materials are included. Kits become school property after the partnership begins.
📅
Flexible Scheduling
Weekdays, weekends or holidays. Morning, afternoon or after-school. We fit into your timetable without disruption.
📊
Progress Reports
End-of-term assessments, student reports and Demo Day showcases where students present projects to parents and staff.
The Process

How the Partnership Works

From first contact to first class in under two weeks.

01
Express Interest
Contact us to discuss your school's needs and grade levels.
02
Consultation
We assess your lab setup, timetable and program goals.
03
Program Design
Custom curriculum fitted to your grade structure and schedule.
04
MOU and Setup
Simple agreement signed, accounts created, first date confirmed.
05
Classes Begin
Our instructor arrives. You provide the room and the students. We handle everything else.
Program Options

Flexible Programs to Fit Your School

Multiple delivery formats designed around your school's schedule and capacity.

After-school Clubs
Weekly sessions for interested students outside regular hours. Perfect for starting small before a full rollout.
Weekend Workshops
Intensive weekend sessions for schools with tight weekday timetables.
Holiday Camps
Full-day programs during school breaks. Students build a complete project over a full week.
Curriculum Integration
STEM embedded into your regular timetable for Grades 1 to 8 with a structured annual plan.
Teacher Training
Upskill your existing staff in coding and robotics so your school can eventually run programs independently.
Full Partnership
Our flagship. A complete program from Grade 1 to Grade 8. We handle curriculum, delivery, assessments and events.
Start the Conversation

Reach out and we will put together a tailored proposal for your school. No commitment required to start the conversation.
